response: At the Drive-In and Muse both are English rock bands. The At the Drive-In was formed in 1994 and consists of Cedric Bixler (vocals), Omar Rodríguez (guitar, vocals), Paul Hinojos (bass), Tony Hajjar (drums), and Keeley Davis (guitar, vocals). Muse, on the other hand, is an English rock band formed in 1994, consisting of Matt Bellamy (lead vocals, guitar, piano, keyboards), Chris Wolstenholme (bass guitar, backing vocals, keyboards), and Dominic Howard (drums, percussion). Both bands share the commonality of being English rock bands.
